features.featureTitle: Update all product image displays across the site — ProductCard.tsx, PhotoGallery.tsx, and ProductDetailModal.tsx — to render product images at a square 1:1 aspect ratio. Use CSS aspect-ratio: 1/1 with object-fit: cover so images fill the container without distortion. This replaces the previously applied 4:5 ratio. The thumbnail strip in PhotoGallery.tsx should also use 1:1. Ensure this ratio is consistent on both mobile and desktop.
